## Problem

Describe the user, operational, or security problem this change addresses.

## Security boundary

Explain whether this affects authentication, authorization, Docker access, secrets, networking, audit evidence, or deployment. Write `No security-boundary change` when none apply.

## Verification

- [ ] Frontend tests, typecheck, and build pass when affected
- [ ] Backend compile and tests pass when affected
- [ ] Deployment or Terraform validation passes when affected
- [ ] New security-sensitive behavior has explicit tests
- [ ] Documentation matches the completed implementation
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, private keys, Terraform state, or private infrastructure details are included

## Remaining work

List anything intentionally deferred or externally blocked. Use `None` when the change is complete.
